columns.name: ordreNr
columns.description: Unique order identifier

columns.name: orderLineId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the line item in an order

columns.name: supplierNumber
columns.description: Supplier number associated with the product

columns.name: productCode
columns.description: Code identifying the product

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Number of items in the line item

columns.name: price
columns.description: Unit price of the product

columns.name: productName
columns.description: Name of the product

columns.name: pickupInfo
columns.description: Information related to picking up the item

columns.name: unitOfMeasure
columns.description: Unit of measure for the product quantity

columns.name: additionalNote
columns.description: Any additional notes or remarks about the line item

columns.name: fkOrderHeaderNumber
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the order header number

columns.name: fkHighLevelOrderLineId
columns.description: Foreign key linking to a high-level order line identifier

columns.name: fkHighLevelOrderNumber
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the high-level order number

columns.name: fkHighLevelLineId
columns.description: Foreign key linking to a high-level line identifier

columns.name: fkHighLevelSplit
columns.description: Foreign key indicating if the order line is split from another line

columns.name: fkItemDepartmentNumber
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the department number in the item master data

columns.name: fkItemOrderNumber
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the order number within the item system

columns.name: fkItemLineId
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the line identifier in the item system

columns.name: statusCode
columns.description: Status code indicating the current status of the order line

columns.name: orderingPath
columns.description: Path or method used for ordering the product

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last updated

columns.name: enteredBy
columns.description: Person or system who entered the order line information

columns.name: customerNumber
columns.description: Customer number associated with the order

columns.name: variantProductCode
columns.description: Extended or variant product code for more detailed identification
